scripts.docker:prune: docker compose down -v --rmi all --remove-orphans && docker volume prune -f
scripts.games:test:all: bun run games:typecheck && bun run games:test:unit && bun run games:test:integration && bun run games:test:e2e
scripts.wallets:test:all: bun run wallets:typecheck && bun run wallets:test:unit && bun run wallets:test:integration && bun run wallets:test:e2e
scripts.check:backend: bun run contracts:typecheck && bun run games:test:all && bun run wallets:test:all
scripts.check:frontend: bun run frontend:typecheck && bun run frontend:build
